---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new resource area, capability, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the gap or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Resource area / Graph API (if applicable)
If this involves a new M365 resource area, list the Graph API endpoints it would use
and the permissions required.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.
